controls.title: Govern 1: Policies and processes
controls.description: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization for mapping, measuring, and managing AI risks are in place, transparent, and effective.

controls.title: Govern 2: Accountability structures
controls.description: Accountability structures are in place so appropriate teams and individuals are empowered, responsible, and trained.

controls.title: Govern 3: Workforce diversity and inclusion
controls.description: Workforce diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility processes are prioritized in AI risk management.

controls.title: Govern 4: Organizational culture
controls.description: Organizational teams are committed to a culture that considers and communicates AI risk.

controls.title: Govern 5: Engagement with AI actors
controls.description: Processes are in place for robust engagement with relevant AI actors and affected communities.

controls.title: Govern 6: Third-party and supply chain risk
controls.description: Policies and procedures address AI risks and benefits arising from third-party software, data, and supply chain.

controls.title: Map 1: Context established
controls.description: Context of the AI system, including intended purpose and deployment setting, is established and understood.

controls.title: Map 2: Categorization
controls.description: Categorization of the AI system and its tasks is performed.

controls.title: Map 3: Capabilities and benefits
controls.description: AI capabilities, targeted usage, goals, and expected benefits and costs are understood against benchmarks.

controls.title: Map 4: Risks of components
controls.description: Risks and benefits are mapped for all components of the AI system, including third-party software and data.

controls.title: Map 5: Impacts characterized
controls.description: Impacts to individuals, groups, communities, organizations, and society are characterized.

controls.title: Measure 1: Methods and metrics
controls.description: Appropriate methods and metrics for measuring AI risk are identified and applied.

controls.title: Measure 2: Trustworthy characteristics
controls.description: AI systems are evaluated for trustworthy characteristics (validity, safety, security, privacy, fairness, explainability).

controls.title: Measure 3: Tracking over time
controls.description: Mechanisms for tracking identified AI risks over time are in place.

controls.title: Measure 4: Measurement efficacy
controls.description: Feedback about the efficacy of measurement is gathered and assessed.

controls.title: Manage 1: Risk prioritization
controls.description: AI risks based on Map and Measure output are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

controls.title: Manage 2: Benefit maximization
controls.description: Strategies to maximize benefits and minimize negative impacts are planned, implemented, and documented.

controls.title: Manage 3: Third-party risk
controls.description: AI risks and benefits from third-party entities are managed.

controls.title: Manage 4: Response and recovery
controls.description: Risk treatments, including response, recovery, and communication plans, are documented and monitored.
